title: Bridge Essay: Nothingness, Oneness, and Infinity: Transcendent Experience as a Promising Front

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Nondual/Unity** (Phase 16) with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Links Nondual/Unity to mechanistic neuroscience through Nothingness,, Oneness,, and, Infinity:, Transcendent.

**Nothingness, Oneness, and Infinity: Transcendent Experience as a Promising Frontier for Religion and Health Research.** — J Relig Health. PMID: 36640250. DOI: 10.1007/s10943-023-01740-8. This paper advocates for arenewed focus into the experiential domain of religious and spiritual expression in research on physical and mental health. Most studies, up to now, have investigated risk or protection associated with behavioral measures of religiousness, whether public behaviors such as religious attendance or private behaviors such as personal prayer. Religious attitudes, beliefs, and identity have been studied, as well, as have religious self-rating scales of various types, but, re
